narrative:
Lewis/Higginsport (precinct in Brown County) has 483 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
